chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 213 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution of reference as notice not issued, cost not paid nor copies supplied by advocate for appellant 04.05.2026 Mr. Akhtar Ali, advocate for the applicant Notice was issued in this matter and fixed date was given, however, matter remains listed for order as to non-prosecution. Upon being so confronted learned counsel remains unable to articulate any cogent reason. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011. Judge Judge Amjad
